hooks.command: : zundamonotify ; curl -s --connect-timeout 1 -H "Content-Type: application/json" --data '{"volume":20}' -X POST http://host.docker.internal:12378/notifications/stop || curl -s --connect-timeout 1 -H "Content-Type: application/json" --data '{"volume":20}' -X POST http://localhost:12378/notifications/stop

: zundamonotify ; curl -s --connect-timeout 1 -H "Content-Type: application/json" --data '{"volume":20}' -X POST http://host.docker.internal:12378/notifications/notification || curl -s --connect-timeout 1 -H "Content-Type: application/json" --data '{"volume":20}' -X POST http://localhost:12378/notifications/notification

: zundamonotify ; curl -s --connect-timeout 1 -H "Content-Type: application/json" --data '{"volume":20}' -X POST http://host.docker.internal:12378/notifications/notification || curl -s --connect-timeout 1 -H "Content-Type: application/json" --data '{"volume":20}' -X POST http://localhost:12378/notifications/notification
